description: Post-extraction validation rules for QA of extracted obligations. Each rule describes a check, its condition, and remediation.

rules.name: missing_actor
rules.description: No actor was detected in the obligation.
rules.remediation: Flag for LLM to infer actor from surrounding clauses or document context.

rules.name: missing_deadline_for_reporting
rules.description: A reporting obligation has no deadline extracted.
rules.remediation: Re-scan the clause and surrounding text for deadline phrases. Flag for LLM.

rules.name: deadline_in_action_text
rules.description: The action field still contains a deadline phrase like 'within X days'.
rules.remediation: Extract deadline to deadline.text and clean action text.

rules.name: discretionary_marked_mandatory
rules.description: Obligation type is mandatory but the clause uses 'may' or 'at its discretion'.
rules.check: obligation.obligation_type == 'mandatory' and regex('\\bmay\\b|at its discretion', clause_text)
rules.remediation: Reclassify as discretionary unless context overrides (e.g. 'may not' = prohibition).

rules.name: mandatory_marked_discretionary
rules.description: Obligation type is discretionary but the clause uses 'shall'.

rules.name: vague_action
rules.description: Action text is too short or uses vague placeholder language.
rules.check: len(obligation.action) < 20 or obligation.action in ['Review the clause manually.', 'Be compliant.']
rules.remediation: Flag for LLM to generate a cleaner, summarised action description.

rules.name: verbatim_action
rules.description: Action text is a near-verbatim copy of the raw clause (>80% similarity).
rules.remediation: Flag for LLM to summarise rather than copy.

rules.name: duplicate_obligation
rules.description: Two obligations in the same section have >88% action similarity and the same actor.
rules.check: similarity(ob1.action, ob2.action) > 0.88 and ob1.actor == ob2.actor and ob1.section_id == ob2.section_id
rules.remediation: Merge the lower-confidence obligation into the higher-confidence one.

rules.name: missing_effective_date
rules.description: Document contains 'with effect from' or 'come into force' but no effective_date was extracted.
rules.check: regex('with effect from|come into force', doc.raw_text) and doc.effective_date == null
rules.remediation: Re-run effective date extraction rules (ED-001 through ED-009).

rules.name: incorrect_department_mapping
rules.description: Departments do not align with the expected mapping for the obligation's domain.
rules.remediation: Re-apply department_mapping.json rules. Use keyword_signals for additional departments.

rules.name: shall_clause_not_extracted
rules.description: A clause in the document contains 'shall' but produced no extracted obligation.
rules.remediation: Force re-extract the clause. Escalate to LLM if still missed.

rules.name: contradictory_obligations
rules.description: Two obligations in the same document contradict each other (one says shall, another says shall not for same actor and action).
rules.check: ob1.actor == ob2.actor and similarity(ob1.action, ob2.action) > 0.7 and ob1.obligation_type == 'mandatory' and ob2.obligation_type == 'prohibition'
rules.remediation: Flag both obligations. Use clause hierarchy (later clause overrides earlier) or LLM resolution.

rules.name: missing_cross_reference
rules.description: Clause text mentions another circular or act but no cross_reference was captured.
rules.check: regex('(?:circular|direction|guidelines?|as per|in accordance with)', clause_text) and len(obligation.cross_references) == 0

rules.name: fine_not_captured
rules.description: Clause mentions rupees or INR but fine_exposure_inr is null.
rules.remediation: Re-run fine extraction regex on this clause.

rules.name: prohibited_activity_low_severity
rules.description: A prohibition obligation is classified as medium or low severity.
rules.remediation: Elevate to high severity minimum for prohibition obligations.

rules.name: hallucination_check_actor
rules.description: Actor name does not appear anywhere in the clause or document.
rules.check: obligation.actor.lower() not in clause_text.lower() and obligation.actor.lower() not in doc_header.lower()
rules.remediation: LLM may have hallucinated the actor. Default to 'Regulated Entity' and re-confirm.

rules.name: effective_date_before_circular_date
rules.description: Extracted effective_date is earlier than the circular's issued date.
rules.remediation: This is valid for retrospective amendments. Flag for human review.

rules.name: confidence_too_low
rules.description: Obligation confidence is below minimum threshold.
rules.remediation: Either drop this obligation or escalate to LLM for re-evaluation.
